scholarships.title: LPDP Scholarship
scholarships.audienceId: Pelamar Indonesia jenjang magister dan doktor
scholarships.audienceEn: Indonesian applicants for master's and doctoral study
scholarships.descriptionId: Beasiswa Pemerintah Indonesia untuk pendidikan magister dan doktor melalui skema pendanaan LPDP.
scholarships.descriptionEn: Indonesian government scholarship funding for master's and doctoral degree study.

scholarships.title: KNB Scholarship
scholarships.descriptionId: Beasiswa Pemerintah Indonesia bagi mahasiswa internasional dari negara berkembang untuk menempuh pendidikan tinggi di Indonesia.
scholarships.descriptionEn: Indonesian government scholarship for international students from developing countries.

scholarships.title: UNPAD ASEAN Scholarship
scholarships.audienceId: Mahasiswa dan profesional dari kawasan ASEAN
scholarships.audienceEn: Students and professionals from ASEAN countries
scholarships.descriptionId: Program unggulan Unpad bagi mahasiswa dan profesional ASEAN melalui jalur magister dan kolaborasi akademik.
scholarships.descriptionEn: Unpad flagship opportunity for ASEAN students and professionals through master's and academic collaboration tracks.

scholarships.title: BRIN Scholarship
scholarships.audienceId: Pelamar dengan orientasi sains dan riset
scholarships.descriptionId: Peluang pendanaan berbasis sains dan riset; ketersediaan skema serta persyaratan perlu diperiksa pada pengumuman tahun berjalan.
scholarships.descriptionEn: Science and research-oriented funding; annual scheme availability and eligibility should be checked on the official page.

scholarships.title: UNPAD GLOW
scholarships.audienceId: Mahasiswa Unpad untuk program mobilitas internasional
scholarships.audienceEn: Unpad students joining international mobility programs
scholarships.descriptionId: Dukungan mobilitas internasional bagi mahasiswa Unpad untuk pertukaran, riset, magang, dan program budaya.
scholarships.descriptionEn: International mobility support for Unpad students in exchange, research, internship, and cultural programs.

scholarships.title: UNPAD Visiting Grant
scholarships.audienceId: Mahasiswa universitas mitra yang berkegiatan di Unpad
scholarships.audienceEn: Students from partner universities undertaking activities at Unpad
scholarships.descriptionId: Program dukungan bagi mahasiswa universitas mitra untuk kegiatan akademik, riset, atau magang di Unpad.
scholarships.descriptionEn: Support for students from partner universities joining academic, research, or internship activities at Unpad.
